raw_text: november 2015 daniel rubén rivera escudero c/ del rector royo villanova 10 bloque 4 7c. 28040 madrid (spain) tels.: (+34).628.11.11.49 (+34).91.459.58.50 daniel .rivera.escuderoo gmail.com daniel rubén rivera escudero born in madrid on february 21* 1989 spanish citizen education > 2015. aeronautical engineer. e.t.s. ingenieros aeronáuticos, upm (spain). a masther thesis: design of a 5 mw windturbine. a major in airplane design. a 2011/2012 academic year at rwth aachen university (germany). professional experience > 2014-2015. airia ingeniería y servicios s.a. a internship as consultant. a preparation of bids for tenders. a economic feasibility assessments for new airports. > 2013. airbus operations. a internship in the a350xwb stress department. a design of a monolithic multispar structure for the a330 elevator. > 2010, 2011, 2014, 2015. interway. a summer language exchange program leader in england and usa. > 2008 present. private tutor. a mathematics, physics and english teacher for school and high school students. languages > spanish. mother tongue. > english. expert. a 2008. certificated in advanced english. british council. > german. intermediate. > chinese. basic. november 2015 it-skills daniel rubén rivera escudero > > design. a catia v5 a solid edge. a autocad fem. a nastran/patran. programming. a fortran 90. a python a matlab microsoft office. additional information > 2012/2013. erasmus tutor at e.t.s.l. aeronáuticos. > 2011/2012. 20 hours of flight simulator at rwth aachen. > willingness to travel and relocate.
